[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00101001 3
2 00111011 5
3 11011111 7
4 00110011 4
5 01010000 2
6 00010000 1
7 00111011 5

01 10 00110011 4 match 4
12 21 01010000 2 match 5
23 32 00010000 1 match 6
34 43 00111011 5 match 2 7
45 54 00101001 3 match 1
56 65 00101001 3 match 1
67 76 00011011 4
70 07 10011011 5

02 20 10010000 2
13 31 00110011 4 match 4
24 42 00010000 1 match 6
35 53 00101001 3 match 1
46 64 00111011 5 match 2 7
57 75 00001001 2
60 06 00111011 5 match 2 7
71 17 01010111 5

03 30 00111011 5 match 2 7
14 41 00110111 5
25 52 00000000 a
36 63 00111011 5 match 2 7
47 74 00011111 5
50 05 00101001 3 match 1
61 16 00110011 4 match 4
72 27 11010000 3

04 40 00111011 5 match 2 7
15 51 00100001 2
26 62 00010000 1 match 6
37 73 00011011 4
